response.justification: Despite strong general software development credentials spanning 15+ years, this candidate fundamentally misaligns with the role's requirements. Native-level Japanese is an explicit requirement with zero evidence of proficiency. Recent experience (8+ years) focuses on full-stack web development while the role demands strong embedded C programming—the candidate's C work is from 2014-2015. Most critically, there is no demonstrated expertise in the embedded networking protocols, security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X), or firmware development this specialized role requires.
strengths: 15+ years of software development progression to senior roles demonstrates strong technical foundation and growth
Linux systems and low-level programming experience (DLang, C++) shows capability with systems-level concepts
Fluent English and strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, testing focus) align with security-critical firmware standards
concerns: No evidence of Japanese language ability despite being a required qualification for the role
C programming experience is 10+ years old with recent focus on JavaScript/TypeScript/web development rather than embedded systems
No demonstrated expertise in embedded networking (Layer-2/3, NETCONF, SNMP), security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal), or firmware development

key_factors.factor: Recent C Proficiency for Embedded Systems
